name: MES Job Jacket
description: Manufacturing Execution System - Job Jacket tracking application

realIssues.title: Export endpoint lacks authentication
realIssues.description: GET /api/export/printbindery/:jobId has no auth middleware. Anyone who knows a jobId can export jacket data.

realIssues.title: Inconsistent error handling style
realIssues.description: Some floor routes use inline res.status(500).json() instead of sendError() middleware used in 27 other files

realIssues.title: Missing Error Boundary in App.jsx
realIssues.description: Lazy-loaded components wrapped in Suspense but no ErrorBoundary. If chunk fails to load, app crashes.

realIssues.title: No API type definitions
realIssues.description: No TypeScript or JSDoc type definitions for API response shapes. Makes maintenance harder.

confirmedFalsePositives.reality: All constants and functions are properly exported and imported

confirmedFalsePositives.claimedIssue: Lazy-loaded screen components may not exist
confirmedFalsePositives.reality: All 10 screen files verified to exist in client/src/screens/
Standard Vite dev proxy behavior - intentional

confirmedFalsePositives.claimedIssue: Missing rate limiting on badge-scan, pairing, uploads
confirmedFalsePositives.reality: Global express-rate-limit (200 req/min) on all /api/* routes + dedicated upload limiter
Whitelist validation exists in src/routes/ref.js - only 8 approved table names
All routes verified to have try/catch blocks
All routes exist: BOM in materials.js, production counts in production.js, scheduler endpoints in scheduler.js
Kiosk correctly calls /api/floor/auth/badge-scan/v2; backend route exists
